title: METRN (Meteorin) in Intervertebral Disc Degeneration: reproducible transcriptomic analysis code and processed data
description: R and Python scripts plus processed data for the exploratory public transcriptomic analysis of METRN (Meteorin) in intervertebral disc degeneration (IVDD), with translational relevance to adolescent idiopathic scoliosis (AIS). Companion repository to the BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders manuscript.
